display_text: Dagger of Ristul, Cost: 0: Non-purchasable item granting a temporary damage boost by sacrificing health. The active Imbrue consumes 100 health to gain 40 damage for 8 seconds, with a 30-second cooldown. Also provides a passive 15 attack speed. A high-risk, high-reward choice for amplifying damage output in critical moments.
